posts.raw_content:
This post may not be popular, but anywhere else, I'd be lynched, banned, or even frowned on by society for having these views. 

The UK has turned into a 3rd world ghetto. So far, I've not been able to escape to the USA (which was and still is my plan). The decay in the UK makes India look nice.

And that's where I want to begin. For many, many years, immigration to the UK has been in staggering numbers. Absolutely, f*cking staggering numbers.

I think London for example is something like 39% white British now (don't quote me, the figures may be different). 

So now, the team I work with is 50% foreign. We have 30 people in our team and 15 of them are now foreign (many of them speaking broken English). What i'm seeing is that all the foreign people have formed a "clan". All of the native people are just going solo. So any time that one of the foreigners does something cool, there's at least 15 people hyping them up. So now they get the recognition whilst the rest of us are just spinning our wheels.

Why don't white people (or natives to our country) stick together? Our entire cities and villages have changed (some remain but they're slowly being taken over).

So I guess the question is: what problems are you seeing in the US from mass immigration? Are you guys experiencing it?  If you aren't getting it as bad as us, do everything in your power to stop it happening. It's destroyed the fabric of the country. From work, to personal life etc it has destroyed us.
